ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "generation_biomass" REAL /* Energy generated from biomass */,
  "generation_fossil_brown_coal_lignite" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil brown coal/lignite */,
  "generation_fossil_coal_derived_gas" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil coal-derived gas */,
  "generation_fossil_gas" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil gas */,
  "generation_fossil_hard_coal" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil hard coal */,
  "generation_fossil_oil" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil oil */,
  "generation_fossil_oil_shale" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil oil shale */,
  "generation_fossil_peat" REAL /* Energy generated from fossil peat */,
  "generation_geothermal" REAL /* Energy generated from geothermal sources */,
  "generation_hydro_pumped_storage_aggregated" REAL /* Energy generated from hydro pumped storage (aggregated) */,
  "generation_hydro_pumped_storage_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumed by hydro pumped storage */,
  "generation_hydro_run_of_river_and_poundage" REAL /* Energy generated from hydro run-of-river and poundage */,
  "generation_hydro_water_reservoir" REAL /* Energy generated from hydro water reservoirs */,
  "generation_marine" REAL /* Energy generated from marine sources */,
  "generation_nuclear" REAL /* Energy generated from nuclear sources */,
  "generation_other" REAL /* Energy generated from other sources */,
  "generation_other_renewable" REAL /* Energy generated from other renewable sources */,
  "generation_solar" REAL /* Energy generated from solar sources */,
  "generation_waste" REAL /* Energy generated from waste */,
  "generation_wind_offshore" REAL /* Energy generated from wind offshore */,
  "generation_wind_onshore" REAL /* Energy generated from wind onshore */,
  "forecast_solar_day_ahead" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation from solar sources (day ahead) */,
  "forecast_wind_offshore_day_ahead" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation from wind offshore (day ahead) */,
  "forecast_wind_onshore_day_ahead" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation from wind onshore (day ahead) */,
  "total_load_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted total load */,
  "total_load_actual" REAL /* Actual total load */,
  "price_day_ahead" REAL /* Forecasted energy price (day ahead) */,
  "price_actual" REAL /* Actual energy price */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Data quality flag (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the forecast is associated with */,
  "forecast_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source or load type */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., generation, load, price) */,
  "forecast_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the forecast (e.g., day ahead, hour ahead) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_forecast_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the price is associated with */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., day ahead, actual) */,
  "price_value" REAL /* Price value */,
  "price_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the price (e.g., EUR/MWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_data" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the load is associated with */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of load (e.g., forecast, actual) */,
  "load_value" REAL /* Load value */,
  "load_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the load (e.g., MW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, operator, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., energy management, grid operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., generation, load, price) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_data" TEXT /* Data displayed by the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
